mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate falls below 6.0%, labor market tightness accelerates wage growth and consumer spending, boosting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5-day returns in more than 50% of instances where UNRATE drops below 6.0% within a quarter.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with declining housing starts signals a rotation from construction to manufacturing, indicating strong corporate capex and positive forward equity returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising INDPRO and falling HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: In a rising rate environment, real GDP growth exceeding 2.5% annualized rate signals resilient demand that offsets higher borrowing costs, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative in more than 55% of observations where FEDFUNDS rises and GDPC1 exceeds 2.5% annualized.

mechanism_narrative: Continuous month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding business activity, which directly supports equity valuations and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC of PAYEMS month-over-month change against 5-day SPX returns remains below 0.02 across all rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When real personal savings decline below $400 billion, consumer leverage increases and spending accelerates, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as earnings expectations rise.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are not significantly positive when RSAFS drops below $400B, or the signal produces negative returns in more than 50% of triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production alongside stable or falling inflation indicates favorable supply-side dynamics that expand profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combination of rising INDPRO and flat or falling CPIAUCSL fails to predict positive 60-day equity returns in more than 65% of out-of-sample windows.

mechanism_narrative: During periods of high unemployment, accelerating job growth signals a cyclical recovery that disproportionately benefits equity risk premiums, leading to positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are negative in more than 50% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 7.0% and PAYEMS shows positive month-over-month growth.
